Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Osho's Upgrades in Arrenius.
  2. Defeat 3 Elite Gunner lvl 10, Elite Launcher lvl 10.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Infestation: Part 2.

Quest Text

Description

While doing some repairs on the ship we heard some local stories about the mechanical fortress close by. Recently the defenses around it has been increased and it now threatens this station. We should assist them in this fight.

Completion

Captain! The lead engineer on the Upgrade Station wants to talk with us.
